title: Coworld Manifest
description: Schema for a complete game world in the Softmax universe.

game.description: The Cogame for this world. manifest_uri points to a cogame_manifest.json that validates against cogame_manifest_schema.json.

player.description: Base player policies that users can fork from and that can competently play the game.

grader.description: Base grader policies that estimate expected probability of winning, or score for games without win/loss outcomes.

reporter.description: Base reporter policies that summarize logs from game experience into high-level descriptions of important events.

commissioner.description: Base commissioner policies that run tournaments and produce rankings.

diagnoser.description: Base diagnoser policies that assess basic competence across important mechanics and gameplay situations.

optimizer.description: Base optimizer policies or agents that improve players and graders.

variants.description: Targeted game configs that factorize the game into mechanics for training and evaluation.

certification.description: Coworld-level smoke episode used by the platform certifier. References declared variant and player IDs; the certifier supplies artifact destinations.

manifest_uri.description: Path or URI to a cogame_manifest.json instance.

variant_id.description: ID of the declared variant used for the smoke episode.

players.description: Player slots for the smoke episode, each referencing a declared player by ID.

initial_params.description: Optional query params appended to the player's websocket URL.
